sections.paragraph:
verb לעוות

to distort, pervert

verb להתעוות

be perverted, distorted; contorted

verb לעוות (>>עיוות)

to distort, pervert

masculine noun עוות (>>עיוות)

distortion, deformity, perversion, falsification, twist, malformation, miscarriage, mutilation, warp, wrench, writhe, wryness, digression
